review_text: Really great experience with my tattoo removal. The staff is super friendly and makes me feel comfortable the whole time. Everything is clean, quick, and well explained. Definitely recommend!
The people there are very friendly and remember conversations that I have with them.
Every time I come in for my scheduled appointment, I don't have a long wait to be seen. My tech is the best. She is very friendly and makes the experience easy to forget about the pain.

Audri and Tina are awesome. The second i walked in the door, they were welcoming, took time to educate me, share her personal experiences with me and made me feel very comfortable about being a Removery client. Would highly recommend
Tina has been awesome every visit: very friendly, professional, and gets me through the treatment quickly. The location is very clean and welcoming. I highly recommend for your tattoo removal needs!

New update: progress is going extremely well. I cant recommend this place enough. The staff is so warm and welcoming and im truly glad im doing this for myself instead of waiting longer.

Update!! I've done 3 sessions so far and the results are definitely showing. I have a large chest piece tattoo and a tattoo on my arm and im so glad I decided to get them removed.

Absolutely love this location! They are knowledgeable, kind and will be honest about every step you need to take. I highly recommend Removery - Round Rock!

I called today to see if we could make my appointment sooner, today, if possible and without hesitation I was rescheduled for a couple of hours after the phone call for today. Polite, courteous , and professional per usual, always know my name when I walk in and got me in and out. 10/10 would recommend the Round Rock, TX location specifically due to the staff themselves.
I always look forward to seeing Audri and Tina. My tattoos are almost gone  and I have Tina to thank. I’ve seen the most results with her vs other locations. They are highly skilled at this work.

The staff is very professional and makes me feel comfortable.  My  husband was so surprised at the progress made..  it almost wants me to get another tattoo because they are sooo good.
Super friendly staff. Very welcoming. Amelia was both personal and professional.
My first session was a breeze! Audri was awesome and I enjoyed our chat while getting zapped. Look forward to my next session!
Everyone is Friendly and very professional.  Very clean!!!
Always a great experience at Removery Round Rock. Amilia, Tina and Audri are always such a pleasure and so welcoming!
Great experience! The Round Rock location staff was attentive, kind, and provided excellent customer service. I’d definitely recommend! Thanks you ladies for the service you all provide.
I had a great first experience they were able to do same day when I only had a conference scheduled it was so fast! All the staff were so kind
We love Removery staff!! We highly recommend and always have the best experience!
Very friendly staff and a very clean facility.
I have been going here for a while now removing one of my tattoos. The girls are all so nice and lovely, always send me reminders for everything, and are great about scheduling.
Excelente atención recomendado 100%

I am so happy with the  progress with my tattoo removal.  Everyone is super friendly and professional.  I get my appointments scheduled promptly.  All the work is documented.  Place is clean.  I appreciate all the details the staff put in to make it a great experience every time.
Amazing experience! The staff were really friendly, able to take me in on the same day of my consultation, and they lasered everything off in one sitting. It was painless!

I have had 3 sessions so far and everytime I’ve had a great experience. They really do a good job at explaining to you how the procedure will go and making sure you’re comfortable during the laser treatment. So excited to see my tattoos disappear, even just 3 sessions in my small fine line red one seems to be almost gone !
Really good service, friendly and quick!

I had a great experience going in for my first treatment at Removery in Round Rock! Audri is so kind, knowledgeable, and efficient. Amilia and Tina are wonderful as well 😊. The clinic is also very clean and relaxing. Can’t wait for my next appointment. Thank you ladies!

The team has been so welcoming and made this process an easy decision. The guidance and care the team has offered has made me extremely comfortable. I had my first session on Saturday, it was easy, mostly painless, and quick. I’m excited to see the progress over the next several months.
Highly recommend, friendly staff, makes you feel very comfortable. Just go and get it done, finally.
Amilia was very helpful and answered every question I had
I love removery in round Rock Tx!!! They are always so sweet!! I have really noticed a difference in my tattoo removal process.  And will always recommend them to anyone!!
It was quick & easy. I am honestly satisfied with the first session results. Super excited!!!
Always a good experience and I’ve been going for a long time.  Great customer service!

The staff are so friendly and professional. They take good care of me. They always ask about how my results are after the treatment. The staff always remind me of the treatment I should give to the area that was treated. Today the treatment seemed to go by very fast. My removal is almost complete and they were very dark and full of different colors.

First of all, the nicest employees. Price wise, still cheaper than my student loans as thats the only price comparison that I can make. I'd like to say I learned my lesson with last minute cheap tattoos 👍

Extremely nervous about the tattoo removal process… Removery was amazing and explained the entire process from the beginning to the after care. Extremely quick and honestly was almost painless. Process felt like a hot rubber band snapping against the skin. Afterwards the pain was minimal and would compare to a sunburn.
Tina is awesome!! She truly cares about her clients and makes them feel completely comfortable with the process.
These ladies are amazing! Super kind, efficient and work well together and on my background for scheduling. It’s been a great experience. I’m almost there!
They are amazing! Removal of any and all tattoos is truly possible.

I’ve been coming to Removery Round Rock for several years for tattoo removal and have had such a great experience. Amilia, Tina, and Audri are always incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and kind. They make what could be an uncomfortable process feel easy and supportive, and they always take the time to explain everything and make sure I’m comfortable. The studio is clean, efficient, and very welcoming. I truly appreciate the care they put into their work and would absolutely recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal.

Zara and Jerry are very professional and nice. I got my first session the same day as my consultation.
Tyler did my last session.  She was awsome!   She asked me if I needed any breaks while my laser session was going on and I told her no, But she gave me a little break anyway and I was really glad about that. She is very friendly and professional.  My tattoo that I am removing has lightened up alot.
I would definitely recommend Tyler to anyone for tattoo removal.
I had another tattoo removal session today. I'm so grateful for Tyler numbing my lower back with ice packs before  starting the session. Its over quickly! I can tell Tyler is very experienced and well trained. She always checks with me throughout the process to make sure im doing ok and she's OK with stopping if I need a break. When the service is over she goes over after-care instructions. My tattoo has lightened up alot! I'm so happy about that! This service is safe, quick and it works.

TREATMENTS ARE GOING VERY WELL. MY TATTOO IS ALMOST, COMPLETELY GONE! YAY! KIRSTEN, AMANDA AND DANIELLE ARE FRIENDLY, AMAZING AND VERY KNOWLEDGEABLE. great location! I've been to a few others and this is the best. really great customer service and experienced technicians.

Best team  . Kirsten is the goat !!
In and out. Very talented work staff! Respectful and professional. Process is super easy! Second session done and already seeing great results! -Jon
Thank you Removery, so far the process has been smooth. Thank you to the staff as well! Highly recommend for anyone looking into tattoo removal

Danielle, Kirsten, and Amanda were all amazing. They were very friendly and even checked in on me after my appointment, which was so thoughtful.

They showed me photos of people with my same skin tone who had tattoos in a similar area and their results. That made me feel really confident moving forward. I also got a 15 percent off deal for full tattoo removal with unlimited sessions, so I had to take it.

I plan to keep going until my tattoo is completely gone. I will post before and after photos next year around this time, or share progress updates along the way. I went in for a consultation on 4/11 and they were able to start my treatment the same day. Best decision I have made.

Kirsten is doing my treatments. She is very kind and made sure I felt comfortable the whole time. She held an ice pack on my tattoo to help numb the area before starting and took her time, which helped me relax. During the laser removal process, she blew cold air through a tube onto the area, which really helped reduce the pain.

I am so glad I chose Removery after wanting this tattoo gone for so many years!! ♥️
Excellent staff. Knowledgeable, friendly and professional. Thank you Removery Tattoo Removal of Houston, TX!!
The staff was very friendly and informative
The girls at Removery were so kind and informative. I felt confident and comfortable throughout the quote process and went straight into my first treatment. Can’t wait for the next one!

The assistance that was provided was exceptional!  Danielle and Kristen was awesome! They were both very welcoming and informative about the process.  They made sure the atmosphere had a positive vibe
Danielle and Kristen are the best!

Update: Do not be more than 5 minutes late. They will not see you and then take a lunch break.

Danielle and Kristen were great! I’ve been putting off having my tattoos removed and I’m so happy that I moved forward with it! They made me feel comfortable during the whole process and I’m so relieved to be doing it through Removery. If you’re hesitant about removing your tattoos, don’t be! I just had my 8th laser session and im loving the results from my tattoo removal procedure. My tattoo is fading slowly and there is no scaring or damage to my skin. The staff at Removery Katy is very professional making every moment comfortable as they possibly can.
I have nothing but great things to say about Removery, especially the Katy location. Great service and luckily for me, I’m in and out in less than 20 seconds.

Very nice people Specially Danielle, she very sweet through the process with you, talks you through it 10/10 recommend. This was my first session ever getting anything like this and she made less nervous for me! 🫶🏽

Everyone was so nice and helpful with the process. This is my first time getting a tattoo removed and they helped me through every step of the way. Like in what financing option is best for me and what to expect with each tattoo session. I’m excited to get my tattoo removed haha, they even reach out to make sure everything is good with aftercare
Great  people and very professional
Great experience! Very fast procedure and they made sure you understood everything!
The girls at Katy removery are always very kind & accommodating!  My tattoos are fading nicely & one is almost completely gone!

Danielle and her team are amazing. Always helping me with my questions or concerns. I appreciate you all!
Danielle is always getting me in and out super fast and is always easy going about the whole process. Great expulsion everytime I have a session here. Thanks again!

I’m just beginning my tattoo removal process with Removery in Katy and I am so happy to say the least. The team here is amazing, sweet, and caring throughout the whole procedure.
Amazing experience. First time getting a tattoo removal they made it so knowledgeable and easy. Thank you guys.
I am having a great experience with Removery. The staff is very professional and knowledgeable. they make the process really easy. I am only on my third session but I am excited to see the progress.

Another good experience this visit.
I really like it here. The scheduling is right on time. Quick and easy. Super friendly service. I'm about halfway through and my tattoo is fading nicely.
I had a great experience at this location, the staff is very friendly and professional! The results have been great. I highly recommend this location for anyone considering tattoo removal.

Had my consultation last Saturday. Danielle was very informative and friendly and I decided to start my tattoo removal journey the same day! The team is great and I look forward to seeing them every 6 weeks until my tatt is gone.

Session 5 is in the books! Everything has been fantastic with my sessions.

Session 7 on the books! Everything is still going well. Recovery after each session hasn't been too bad and the staff continues to be great!

Another great experience at removery Katy..... I can't remember my tech name ... That's just old age..lol .. but always a pleasure to see her... She was a one man show on Friday checking me in and doing my session I was in and out in minutes...

Decided to come to Removery after having a few sessions on my tattoo elsewhere, and wow what a difference! The staff is very kind and knowledgeable, and the actual removal process was so much quicker and less painful! Highly recommend.
He does a really good job , works steady and informs you really well
I love Removery Friendswood!

I'm on appointment number eight
The service is always quick
The removal is not painless because it's not possible to be painless.
But they do the best they can to help mitigate that they give you an ice pack to numb the area.

The staff are friendly and always make sure to ask how your day is or what you're up to, as well as ensure that you get your next appointment scheduled without walking out that door right after your appointment absent mindedly.

My gf is telling me that I look bald for the first time in our relationship. Lol. Im getting tattoo removal on my entire head and DaShawn is the technician taking care of the removal. Its definitely a lengthy process but most definitely worth it. Ask for DaShawn!
The team made me feel safe and comfortable!  They explained everything before the service!  I recommend them 10 out of 10!!
Great customer service not pushy, very upfront.   The tech talked me through it did an amazing job. Highly recommend checking the location at  friendwoods out....
First treatment down and was painless. Deshaun explained everything and was very gentle. Can’t wait for my next session.

Fourth treatment. Slow and steady wins the race. If anyone is thinking you're going to come in and get a tattoo removed in one session, you need to do more research. Staff is knowledgeable. Yes it hurts worse than getting the tattoo. The tattoo is starting to break up and get removed by my lymphatic system.
Lovely atmosphere.  Just two forms to fill out and pricing is feasible. Great experience.

Hi! Just want to share my great experience with DeShawn of Removery Friendswood. I love working with DeShawn. For the couple of times I’ve been to the office regarding my tattoo removal, He always provides A1 customer service, makes me feel comfortable and at ease and answered all my questions.  Deshawn is great at what he does!

Destany and Deshawn are awesome! I’ve been to another location before, but they make this place feel so comforting and definitely making this my home store. Great atmosphere and vibes and always super quick service!
Deshawn is a great technician and always makes the appointment as comfortable as possible
DeShawn is most patient! He plays cool jams during your session which is helpful, puts you at ease. They are on top of scheduling your next session, most professional, I highly recommend.

Very knowledgeable and good environment.... UPDATE: I went to Jess for over a year.  She is very knowledgeable.  I went in for my appointment 15mins late.  Instead of canceling and/or rescheduling I believe she purposely burned me. The reason I believe this is because she didn't say one word to me until after the short procedure, which is unusual.  I could also tell that she was annoyed that I was late because she kept looking out of the front window.  (Unfortunately, I was dealing with a serious family matter over the phone) I would have totally understood if she had to cancel my appointment!  As I was leaving she sarcastically told me to have a nice day.
I reached out to the company and the general manager was helpful.  They said there was an investigation but they could not give me details.  I now have to drive to channelview once my finger heals to finish getting my tattoo removed.  Just be careful in choosing who you allow to use a laser on you.  And if you are late with Jess at the Webster location, just reschedule regardless if they let you in or not. This is a picture over a month after being burned..

Deshawn and Destiney are amazing! They both build great rapport with their clients and are extremely knowledgeable on tattoo removal. The process is fast and Deshawn talks you through it keeping you calm during the process. Thank you both! 🫶🏼🥰

I’ve been coming here for tattoo removal and I truly love this place! Destany at the front desk is always so bubbly  and I mean always. She’s incredibly nice, welcoming, and makes you feel comfortable the moment you walk through the door. Her energy really sets the tone for the whole visit.

Deshawn, the tattoo removal technician, is amazing at what he does. He’s always on it and gets you in and out efficiently, but you never feel rushed. The way he moves the tattoo removal machine, you can tell he knows his job from front to back, especially when working around detailed lines.

He’s quiet at first, but once you start talking to him especially about his family  you can tell he’s such a genuine family man who really loves his kids. It just shows the kind of heart he has. He’s very nice, professional, and makes you feel comfortable throughout the entire process.

I also really appreciate that he puts safety first every time making sure you have your protective glasses on, using ice packs, and checking in to make sure you’re okay.

The whole experience is smooth, professional, and welcoming every single visit. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!
So great, went in for consultation and ended up getting my first session 20 minutes later!

I always have such a good experience when I come for my treatments ! I love a good chit chat when I first walk in & DeShawn is great through out the process once in the actual room. Good vibes always & it makes the experience a lot easier !!
Love this location! The staff here are very friendly and helpful. Overall having tattoos removed takes a lot of time, but the staff here make the process so much better!
My first time at this Location. It was a great experience. DaShawn was my technician and he was professional and kind. The sweet girl at the front desk was also very nice and helpful.
Awesome customers service. The staff is very friendly and welcoming!
Fast and easy process! Friendly staff and great service! Definitely recommend!

Honestly… tattoo removal terrified me. I just finished my fourth session. The anticipation beforehand never gets easier but it helps a lot walking in to a technician who knows what they’re doing. DeShawn is very informative on the process and provides good tips and also knows how to make the process beforehand easy. From icing correctly, letting you take breaks when needed, and talking you through the painful moments (keep breathing, etc). He knows what he’s doing and I am grateful to have a great studio near me and a reverent technician as well. I must say, the Removery crew has been very helpful and they do use the best lasers. My tattoo healing process has been crazy, but beautiful. Thank you, Removery.

Came in with my husband to get a removal in order to enlist in the military and Destani immediately assisted me. She was very sweet and informative and answered every question we had. We were able to get in right after signing paperwork and start the sessions! Deshawn was amazing, very reassuring and his area was clean and well organized while the ambiance was relaxing! He was amazing!
Deshawn and Destani were awesome, the treatment was quick and easy, wasn’t painful at all!
Great atmosphere and caring professionals

If you are considering tattoo removal I highly recommend this location! The staff are amazing, extremely helpful and talk everything over with you so you feel comfortable. My tattoo is looking amazing, so excited to finally have it gone. Thank you so much!
Deshawn was wonderful!
Awesome and fun environment that really makes you feel at ease. DeShawn is incredible and provides an explanation for everything he does and takes his time answering any/all questions.
Quick service, nice people and very.informative consultation process.

So far so good. I went in for a consult, and didn't expect much more than that. They worked with me on a payment plan, and I started the removal process. It wasn't near a painful as I had heard. It will be well worth the pain and price to be ride of something that reminds me of a very bad time in my life.
This location is nice, clean, and they treated me well. Friendly, understanding, and quick.
Very friendly staff!! The office is clean and well organized. I arrived feeling very nervous, and the tech Deshawn helped me feel comfortable and explained every step along the way.
Thanks fast keep doing a great job
Second time visiting for treatment and they have excellent service

I have had these ugly birds on the backs of my arms for 15+ years and I’m so self conscious about them. I’ve gone the saline injection route to remove them in the past but never finished. Made an appointment yesterday for a consultation today, walked out less than an hour later with no birds on my arms. Destiny was so great. She explained everything so well and I really had no concerns going into it. DeShawn was just as amazing. He walked me through the whole process and explained the how and the why. Once I made up my mind, he said “let’s do it now!” Which I fully intended to procrastinate and put it off for another 3 months.lol I’m grateful I made this appointment today and so relieved to see results so fast. Their studio is clean, warm and welcoming. Thank you!!!

If you are considering tattoo removal, I recommend this location as I’ve been a client for several years. I have several tattoos that are in the removal process. They’ve already successfully removed one as if it never existed. Deshawn is an amazing technician. He also has an awesome playlist of music and mentally that helps haha He walks you through every appointment step by step. He is professional and knowledgeable. Tattoo removal is definitely a journey and I am so grateful for the level of service and care at this location.
My experience was actually quick & overall the pain was not as bad as I thought it would be . Highly recommend def worth the results
Great place to get your tattoos removed. Great staff and very professional.
Staff at Sugar Land location is extremely knowledgeable and helpful throughout the process. Great service.
Such an amazing opportunity to come across a very put together location with very nice people and the process is as smooth as possible thank you so much removery ❤️
So far the treatment has been great. The tattoo is fading and I have had no skin issues with my sensitive skin during the treatment. The ladies in the office are very sweet and easy to work with.
Super friendly. Would recommend.
LOVE IT HERE THEY DO AN AMAZING JOB! Ive been doing my sessions for about a year now and I’m obsessed! Everyone is knowledgeable and will not steer you wrong!

I got their services 2 1/2 years ago.  I only  had 4 session back then the technician who did my sessions was phenomenal and the place seemed really busy at the time.  I was given a discount for my first 3 package price.  However, today, 2 1/2 years later I went back to the same Sugar Land location and was really disappointed.  Let me just say that I had called their 1-888 number and they tried to get ahold of someone at this location because I had questions about their pricing, etc.  They couldn't reach anyone and told me someone would call me back.  Well after and hour I still didn't hear back from anyone.  So I drove over to the physical location.  A Jasmine/Yasmine? was at the front desk, and the place was completely empty, no clients, no busy servicing, her phone didn't ring once while I was there, and she was completely lacking in any initiative to help me with trying to figure out about any discounts available for a returning customer and it was like pulling teeth trying to find out pricing from her.  She seemed bored with me, like I was just an annoyance.  When I asked if the same tech was there that worked on me over 2 years ago, she said no before I ever gave a name.  Then she proceeded to tell me that they had a complete change over of ALL personnel including the regional manager.  When I said, boy it seems slow today, she said "no, we are actually very busy and have a ton of clients".  Well, I saw none..LOL  Anyway, it was really a turn off and I decided to leave and go somewhere else.  As a potential customer I want someone excited to tell me about their services and costs, even if I am a returning customer.  I want someone to be excited that I walked through the door.  But what I got was a very ho hum, I am bored with you customer treatment.  I loved this place 2 1/2 years ago, but not today years later.  One other thing, she said their were zero discounts or special offers.  When I went down the street to one of their competitors I got an amazing discount on a 10 session package and was treated like they were excited I walked through the door and were anxious to show off their place and tell me about all their services and products.  Sorry Removery but you lost me as a customer for offering no discounts to a returning customer and lacking any enthusiasm or showing initiative to gain me as a customer.

I had a really great experience at this tattoo removal clinic. The staff was very professional, kind, and made me feel comfortable throughout the entire process. I was honestly expecting the pain to be much worse, but it was very manageable and not as bad as I thought it would be.

They took the time to explain everything to me, answer all my questions, and made sure I felt at ease before starting. You can tell they really care about their clients and do quality work.

I’m very happy with my results so far and would definitely recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!

From the jump, the whole staff was super informative and helpful with all my questions.

Gave me re assurance and multiple options to chose from including good finance options as a veteran. Very affordable if you’re serious about removing a tattoo.

6 sessions in so far and there’s definitely good results. Thank you removery!
Very welcoming place. Both of the ladies are amazing. My tattoo removal tech makes everything go smooth.
The ladies at the Sugar Land location are lovely. Great experience.

I had such an amazing experience at Removery today! I officially started my tattoo removal journey on multiple tattoos (both hands, foot, and two name tattoos), and I couldn’t be happier with my decision.

Yasmeen and Ashley were absolutely incredible. They were so kind, patient, and professional from the moment I walked in. They explained everything clearly, answered all of my questions, and made me feel completely comfortable and supported. The treatment itself was much more manageable than I expected, and they constantly checked in to make sure I was okay.

What really made this experience even better was how transparent and helpful they were with pricing and financing. I was able to get an unlimited session package with 0% interest, which made such a big difference and gave me peace of mind knowing I can continue treatments until everything is fully gone.

This was such a meaningful step for me, and I’m truly grateful for how smooth and positive they made the entire process. I highly recommend Removery and especially Yasmeen and Ashley
to anyone considering tattoo removal!
Great staff and great service.

Booked my consultation appointment online. Came in and filled out a few quick forms.

Yasmeen then spent over 30 minutes explaining the whole process, showed me examples of what to expect, and answered all my questions. I mentioned that I’ll be moving out of state soon, and she reassured me that all of my information and services transfers seamlessly to all their other locations.

Once I made the decision, I went next door for my first session with Ashley. She made sure I was comfortable and let me know exactly what to expect for my very first session. Just minutes later, I was leaving! In total I was there for 1 hour and 15 minutes (from filling out forms, to initial consultation, to treatment).

Both Yasmeen and Ashley explained everything thoroughly, step by step, without ever making me feel rushed. The whole experience felt professional, transparent, and genuine. Highly recommend!

I’ve been coming to Removery for about a year and a half now for tattoo removal, and the results have been incredible. I have a large tattoo on my lower back, and I’ve seen so much improvement over time.

My current technician is absolutely amazing — professional, knowledgeable, patient, and genuinely caring. She always makes me feel comfortable and confident throughout the process. The consistency and care she brings to each session really shows in the results.

I truly love this place and highly recommend it to anyone considering tattoo removal.
Such a professional office, very well explained. Answered all my questions. From front of the clinic to back everyone was very patient and professional. Love their energy!
So thorough with the process and definitely made me feel more at ease ! Already seeing progress on one of my smaller tattoos.
Buenos resultados hasta el momento tengo 5 secciones y todo va muy bien las chicas son geniales

I have been going to Removery for a while now. When I first started my treatments I was a little nervous because I always heard the pain was worse than getting a tattoo. I just finished my 6th treatment and I will say the staff is kind and makes me feel as comfortable as possible. The appointment scheduling is accommodating. I see major results with my treatments. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for tattoo removal.

I went in for a consultation, and actually started my 1st treatment the same day. Everyone was very professional and friendly.  Everything was explained in detail, and all of my questions were answered fully. I was very pleased with my visit.
Best studio for tattoo removal ✨
Thanks!!! Always great service always very clean and professional environment
Ashley does a good job with my lasering and care within the process. My project is a challenge but im seeing a big difference  with patience  and endurance.  Thank you sm 🙏✨️🖤

Ashley is always incredibly pleasant and welcoming every time I come in for my laser treatment.
